title: Attempt evaluation
description: Optional validation bundle for a concrete source-edit attempt. This is not a scheduler or constant loop-level rule; call it when the agent wants structured feedback about what is right, wrong, or still unknown.

steps.description: Scan the changed source or proposed snippet for review hazards before accepting the attempt.
Compile the owning translation unit when the attempt is ready for concrete feedback.
Run focused checkdiff or summary mode to report what improved, regressed, or remains mismatched.

steps.condition: Use when compile output reports missing declarations or undeclared identifiers.
steps.description: Return candidate headers as feedback, without writing source.

steps.condition: Use when validation output points to stack, register-flow, or inline-boundary symptoms.
steps.description: Return compiler-shape diagnosis as feedback when normal validation is not enough.

steps.condition: Use when a candidate object already exists and score breakdown is useful.
steps.description: Attach candidate-object scoring to the attempt feedback.
